description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the rustlang/rust:nightly Docker image. Define two stages: test and package. Add a rust-nightly job in the test stage that runs cargo test --verbose. Add a linux-static-x86_64 job in the package stage that runs rustup target install x86_64-unknown-linux-musl, then cargo build --verbose --release --target=x86_64-unknown-linux-musl and strip ./target/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/release/ddssd, produces an artifact named ddssd-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME containing ./target/x86_64-unknown-linux-musl/release/ddssd, and is limited to tag pipelines only.
